creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
I forgot to mention that the tests with devel/py-nose for all flavors (py27, py36, py35 and py37) give the following result:

> Ran 24 tests in 0.417s
>
> FAILED (errors=2)

The two tests that fail are exact the same as previously mentioned in comment #4 .

The tests were done with a running instance of deskutils/growl-for-linux and an empty ~/.gntp file .
